meta.title: Haloferula rosea gen. nov., sp. nov., Haloferula harenae sp. nov., Haloferula phyci sp. nov., Haloferula helveola sp. nov. and Haloferula sargassicola sp. nov., five marine representatives of the family Verrucomicrobiaceae within the phylum 'Verrucomicrobia'
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The GenBank/EMBL/DDBJ accession numbers for the 16S rRNA gene sequences of strains YM23-227T, 06SJR1-1T, AK18-024T, 05IJR53-1T, MN1-1037T and MN1-1047 are AB372852, AB372853, AB372854, AB372855, AB372856 and AB372857, respectively.
